title: Bridge Essay: Long-term practice of intuitive inquiry meditation modulates EEG dynamics during

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Long-term practice of intuitive inquiry meditation modulates EEG dynamics during self-schema processing.** — Heliyon. PMID: 37809825. DOI: 10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e20075. Intuitive inquiry meditation is aunique form of Buddhist Zen/Chan practice in which individuals actively and intuitively utilize the cognitive functions to cultivate doubt and explore the concept of the self. This event-related potential (ERP) study aimed to investigate the neural correlates by which long-term practice of intuitive inquiry meditation induces flexibility in self-schema processing, highlighting the role of doubt and belief processes in this exploration.
